name: Irongate Collective
specialty: A trio of experts known for their ability to navigate the treacherous rifts of the Undercity, offering their services to those willing to pay the high cost of survival

members.name: Vexis Veldorn
members.note: A stoic man with a metal prosthetic arm, lost in the rifts years ago

members.name: Thorn Ly'arien
members.note: A tall and graceful elf, known for her distinctive silver tattoos covering her face

members.name: Gruum Stonefist
members.note: A burly dwarf, feared for his unyielding resolve and stone-carved facial scars

visual: Clad in leather armor and armed with a mix of old and makeshift weapons, they move with a sense of purpose, their eyes always scanning the city for danger
reputation_note: The Irongate Collective is both respected and feared, a symbol of survival in the heart of the Undercity's chaos
